759	func TestReady_StaleClaimedInProgressIsReady(t *testing.T) {
760		withHeartbeat(t, 10*time.Millisecond, 50*time.Millisecond)
761	
762		s := newTestStore(t)
763		b := &Bead{ID: "ddx-stale-ready", Title: "Stale in_progress bead"}
764		require.NoError(t, s.Create(b))
765	
766		// Claim it so status transitions to in_progress.
767		require.NoError(t, s.Claim(b.ID, "worker-a"))
768	
769		// Forge a stale liveness lease so the claim is no longer fresh.
770		stale := time.Now().UTC().Add(-1 * time.Hour)
771		staleRec := claimLivenessRecord{
772			BeadID:    b.ID,
773			UpdatedAt: stale,
774			PID:       os.Getpid(),
775		}
776		data, err := json.Marshal(staleRec)
777		require.NoError(t, err)
778		require.NoError(t, writeAtomicClaimFile(claimLivenessPath(s.Dir, b.ID), append(data, '\n')))
779		require.NoError(t, s.Update(b.ID, func(bd *Bead) {
780			if bd.Extra == nil {
781				bd.Extra = map[string]any{}
782			}
783			staleStr := stale.Format(time.RFC3339)
784			bd.Extra["execute-loop-heartbeat-at"] = staleStr
785			bd.Extra["claimed-at"] = staleStr
786		}))
787	
788		// Operator-facing Ready() must surface the stale-claimed in_progress bead.
789		ready, err := s.Ready()
790		require.NoError(t, err)
791		require.Len(t, ready, 1)
792		assert.Equal(t, b.ID, ready[0].ID)
793	}
